headline: Can Starbucks' $2 Billion Cost-Savings Plan Accelerate EPS Growth?
summary: SBUX leans on a $2B savings plan as Q2 margins expand and FY26 EPS guidance rises, aiming to turn sales momentum into steadier earnings.

raw.headline: Can Starbucks' $2 Billion Cost-Savings Plan Accelerate EPS Growth?

headline: Will Warren Buffett Return As Berkshire Hathaway’s CEO?
summary: Warren Buffett has a great deal to worry about at Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRK-B). Among them is that his net worth has dropped by $5 billion this year to $146 billion, placing him behind Steve Ballmer and Jim Walton, both at $147 billion. He is one of the few people on the Bloomberg Billionaires list ... Will Warren Buffett Return As Berkshire Hathaway’s CEO?

headline: Pump & Pantry to acquire 21 Hy-Vee c-stores
summary: The deal, which is expected to close in July, brings Nebraska-based Pump & Pantry into two new states: Iowa, where it’s acquiring 18 stores, and Minnesota, where it’s picking up one.

headline: Starbucks: The Turnaround Is Real, But So Is The Price
summary: Starbucks is showing real operational improvement, with traffic-led growth and better store execution. Find out why SBUX stock is a Hold.
